overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person morning walk through a futuristic desert-edge city. The player navigates from beneath a concrete overpass, crosses an intersection with vintage-style vehicles, proceeds along a palm-lined street with distinctive teal residential structures, and turns at a gas station corner. The environment features clear skies, long shadows, and a mix of industrial and residential architecture.

events.description: waiting at red light as purple sedan blocks crosswalk
pedestrian signal turns green, proceeding to cross around the vehicle
exiting covered area under overpass into open sunlit street

agents.ego_description: navigating under the overpass, waiting at the intersection for the traffic light, then crossing around the stopped purple car

notable_agents.action: purple vintage sedan stopped at red light blocking the crosswalk
silver car driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass casting shadows on the street below
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
cluster of makeshift colorful structures with corrugated metal roofs
yellow and green gas station canopy visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic urban setting. The player approaches an intersection where a purple vintage sedan is stopped at a red light. After waiting for the pedestrian signal to turn green, the player crosses the street around the vehicle, passing from the sheltered area under the overpass into the open sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined residential street with teal houses

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open residential street with palm trees
slight right turn to follow sidewalk alignment along the curb

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past rows of palm trees and distinctive teal residential buildings

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the opposite sidewalk near the teal buildings

entered.detail: two-story teal and green houses with solar panels and corrugated roofs
tall palm trees lining both sides of the street casting long shadows
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
painted red curb along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit residential street lined with tall palm trees and distinctive teal-colored houses. The overpass is now behind, and the street stretches ahead with utility poles and power lines visible. The environment is quiet with minimal pedestrian activity and parked vehicles along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with gas station and commercial buildings

events.description: beginning left turn at the intersection corner
pausing to allow green pickup truck to pass before completing turn

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection corner, waiting for traffic to clear, then turning left around the gas station

notable_agents.action: green vintage pickup truck waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: gas station with red Manzanita sign and green-yellow canopy structure
large rocky desert hills rising behind the city buildings
red and white FoodCafe sign on building facade
white metal security fence along sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the residential block and turns left at an intersection featuring a gas station with a prominent Manzanita sign. A green pickup truck waits at the corner, and rocky desert hills are visible in the background beyond the commercial buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass into a bright, sun-drenched residential district on the edge of a desert. It begins in the shade of a massive concrete highway structure, moving toward an intersection where a purple vintage sedan waits at a red light. As the pedestrian signal changes, the camera crosses the street and emerges from the shelter of the overpass into the open sunlight of a quiet neighborhood. The scene then expands along a street lined with tall palm trees and distinctive teal-colored houses, passing under a network of utility poles and power lines. Finally, the camera turns left at a commercial corner featuring a Manzanita gas station and a green pickup truck, revealing rocky desert hills rising in the distance.
